description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and runs a before_script that installs the web-ext CLI globally with yarn and prints its version. Define a single stage called build and add a make_all job in that stage that executes the exact command `make --trace all VERBOSE=1`. Configure the job to always publish any files matching link_alert*.xpi as artifacts. No services, caches, or conditional rules are needed, and the pipeline does not deploy to any external target.
